message: Require Proxygen in CMake and drop obsolete enable flag

files.patch:
@@ -972,69 +972,72 @@ endif ()
 
 # -- proxygen ------------------------------------------------------------------
 
-option(TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN "Build and integrate Proxygen" OFF)
 option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_PROXYGEN "Use the Proxygen submodule" ON)
-if (TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN)
-  set(_tenzir_proxygen_target "")
-  if (TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_PROXYGEN)
-    if (NOT EXISTS
-        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/proxygen/CMakeLists.txt")
-      message(
-        FATAL_ERROR
-          "proxygen not found, either use -DTENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_PROXYGEN=OFF"
-          " or initialize the libtenzir/aux/proxygen submodule")
-    endif ()
-    # Keep Proxygen from pulling bundled dependencies so it can stay versioned and
-    # dependency-matched with the separate Folly package.
-    set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_FOLLY
-        OFF
-        CACHE BOOL "")
-    set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_WANGLE
-        OFF
-        CACHE BOOL "")
-    set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_FIZZ
-        OFF
-        CACHE BOOL "")
-    set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_MVFST
-        OFF
-        CACHE BOOL "")
-    set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_ZLIB
-        OFF
-        CACHE BOOL "")
-    set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_ZSTD
-        OFF
-        CACHE BOOL "")
-    set(BUILD_TESTS
-        OFF
-        CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
-    set(_TENZIR_CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES "${CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES}")
-    set(CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES ON)
-    add_subdirectory(libtenzir/aux/proxygen SYSTEM)
-    set(CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES "${_TENZIR_CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES}")
-    dependency_summary(
-      "proxygen" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/proxygen"
-      "Dependencies")
-  else ()
-    find_package(proxygen REQUIRED CONFIG)
-    dependency_summary("proxygen" proxygen::proxygen "Dependencies")
+unset(_tenzir_bundled_proxygen)
+set(_tenzir_proxygen_target "")
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_PROXYGEN)
+  if (NOT EXISTS
+      "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/proxygen/CMakeLists.txt")
+    message(
+      FATAL_ERROR
+        "proxygen not found, either use -DTENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_PROXYGEN=OFF"
+        " or initialize the libtenzir/aux/proxygen submodule")
   endif ()
-  foreach (
-    _tenzir_candidate IN
-    ITEMS "proxygen" "proxygen::proxygen" "Proxygen::proxygen"
-          "proxygenhttpserver" "proxygen::proxygenhttpserver"
-          "Proxygen::proxygenhttpserver")
-    if (TARGET ${_tenzir_candidate})
-      set(_tenzir_proxygen_target "${_tenzir_candidate}")
-      break()
+  # Keep Proxygen from pulling bundled dependencies so it can stay versioned and
+  # dependency-matched with the separate Folly package.
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_FOLLY
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_WANGLE
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_FIZZ
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_MVFST
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_ZLIB
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(PROXYGEN_USE_BUNDLED_ZSTD
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "")
+  set(BUILD_TESTS
+      OFF
+      CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+  set(_TENZIR_CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES "${CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES}")
+  set(CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES ON)
+  add_subdirectory(libtenzir/aux/proxygen SYSTEM)
+  set(CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES "${_TENZIR_CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES}")
+  foreach (_tenzir_proxygen_export_target IN ITEMS proxygen proxygenhttpserver)
+    if (TARGET ${_tenzir_proxygen_export_target})
+      list(APPEND _tenzir_bundled_proxygen ${_tenzir_proxygen_export_target})
     endif ()
   endforeach ()
-  if (NOT _tenzir_proxygen_target)
-    message(
-      FATAL_ERROR "Could not determine the Proxygen CMake target name; extend"
-                  " the candidate list in CMakeLists.txt.")
+  dependency_summary(
+    "proxygen" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/proxygen"
+    "Dependencies")
+else ()
+  find_package(proxygen REQUIRED CONFIG)
+  dependency_summary("proxygen" proxygen::proxygen "Dependencies")
+endif ()
+foreach (
+  _tenzir_candidate IN
+  ITEMS "proxygen" "proxygen::proxygen" "Proxygen::proxygen"
+        "proxygenhttpserver" "proxygen::proxygenhttpserver"
+        "Proxygen::proxygenhttpserver")
+  if (TARGET ${_tenzir_candidate})
+    set(_tenzir_proxygen_target "${_tenzir_candidate}")
+    break()
   endif ()
-  message(STATUS "Using Proxygen target: ${_tenzir_proxygen_target}")
+endforeach ()
+if (NOT _tenzir_proxygen_target)
+  message(
+    FATAL_ERROR "Could not determine the Proxygen CMake target name; extend"
+                " the candidate list in CMakeLists.txt.")
 endif ()
+message(STATUS "Using Proxygen target: ${_tenzir_proxygen_target}")
 
 if (TENZIR_ENABLE_RELOCATABLE_INSTALLATIONS
     AND BUILD_SHARED_LIBS

@@ -535,55 +535,67 @@ if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY)
          "\nfind_package(glog CONFIG REQUIRED)")
   string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST "\nfind_package(folly REQUIRED)")
 endif ()
-if (TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN)
-  if (DEFINED _tenzir_proxygen_target AND TARGET ${_tenzir_proxygen_target})
-    target_link_libraries(libtenzir PRIVATE ${_tenzir_proxygen_target})
-    if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_PROXYGEN)
-      set(_tenzir_find_sodium_module "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/FindSodium.cmake")
-      if (TARGET Sodium::Sodium)
-        get_target_property(_tenzir_sodium_library Sodium::Sodium
-                            IMPORTED_LOCATION)
-        get_target_property(_tenzir_sodium_includes Sodium::Sodium
-                            INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES)
-      endif ()
-      if (_tenzir_sodium_library AND _tenzir_sodium_includes)
-        file(
-          WRITE "${_tenzir_find_sodium_module}"
-          "if (NOT TARGET Sodium::Sodium)\n"
-          "  add_library(Sodium::Sodium UNKNOWN IMPORTED)\n"
-          "  set_target_properties(Sodium::Sodium PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION \"${_tenzir_sodium_library}\" INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES \"${_tenzir_sodium_includes}\")\n"
-          "endif ()\n"
-          "set(Sodium_FOUND TRUE)\n")
-      else ()
-        file(
-          WRITE "${_tenzir_find_sodium_module}"
-          "find_package(PkgConfig QUIET)\n"
-          "if (PKG_CONFIG_FOUND)\n"
-          "  pkg_check_modules(PC_SODIUM QUIET libsodium)\n"
-          "endif ()\n"
-          "find_path(Sodium_INCLUDE_DIR NAMES sodium.h HINTS \${PC_SODIUM_INCLUDEDIR})\n"
-          "find_library(Sodium_LIBRARY NAMES sodium libsodium HINTS \${PC_SODIUM_LIBDIR})\n"
-          "if (Sodium_LIBRARY AND Sodium_INCLUDE_DIR AND NOT TARGET Sodium::Sodium)\n"
-          "  add_library(Sodium::Sodium UNKNOWN IMPORTED)\n"
-          "  set_target_properties(Sodium::Sodium PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION \"\${Sodium_LIBRARY}\" INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES \"\${Sodium_INCLUDE_DIR}\")\n"
-          "endif ()\n"
-          "set(Sodium_FOUND \${Sodium_LIBRARY} AND \${Sodium_INCLUDE_DIR})\n")
-      endif ()
-      install(
-        FILES "${_tenzir_find_sodium_module}"
-        DESTINATION "${TENZIR_INSTALL_CMAKEDIR}/tenzir"
-        COMPONENT Development)
-      string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
-             "\nfind_package(proxygen REQUIRED CONFIG)")
-    endif ()
-    message(VERBOSE "Linking Proxygen target: ${_tenzir_proxygen_target}")
+set(_tenzir_proxygen_httpserver_target "")
+foreach (
+  _tenzir_candidate IN
+  ITEMS "proxygenhttpserver" "proxygen::proxygenhttpserver"
+        "Proxygen::proxygenhttpserver")
+  if (TARGET ${_tenzir_candidate})
+    set(_tenzir_proxygen_httpserver_target "${_tenzir_candidate}")
+    break()
+  endif ()
+endforeach ()
+if (NOT (DEFINED _tenzir_proxygen_target AND TARGET ${_tenzir_proxygen_target}))
+  message(
+    FATAL_ERROR "Proxygen is mandatory but no known Proxygen target was detected."
+  )
+endif ()
+target_link_libraries(libtenzir PRIVATE ${_tenzir_proxygen_target})
+target_link_libraries(libtenzir_builtins PRIVATE ${_tenzir_proxygen_target})
+if (_tenzir_proxygen_httpserver_target)
+  target_link_libraries(libtenzir_builtins
+                        PRIVATE ${_tenzir_proxygen_httpserver_target})
+endif ()
+if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_PROXYGEN)
+  set(_tenzir_find_sodium_module "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/FindSodium.cmake")
+  if (TARGET Sodium::Sodium)
+    get_target_property(_tenzir_sodium_library Sodium::Sodium IMPORTED_LOCATION)
+    get_target_property(_tenzir_sodium_includes Sodium::Sodium
+                        INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES)
+  endif ()
+  if (_tenzir_sodium_library AND _tenzir_sodium_includes)
+    file(
+      WRITE "${_tenzir_find_sodium_module}"
+      "if (NOT TARGET Sodium::Sodium)\n"
+      "  add_library(Sodium::Sodium UNKNOWN IMPORTED)\n"
+      "  set_target_properties(Sodium::Sodium PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION \"${_tenzir_sodium_library}\" INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES \"${_tenzir_sodium_includes}\")\n"
+      "endif ()\n"
+      "set(Sodium_FOUND TRUE)\n")
   else ()
-    message(
-      WARNING
-        "TENZIR_ENABLE_PROXYGEN is set but no known Proxygen target was detected."
-    )
+    file(
+      WRITE "${_tenzir_find_sodium_module}"
+      "find_package(PkgConfig QUIET)\n"
+      "if (PKG_CONFIG_FOUND)\n"
+      "  pkg_check_modules(PC_SODIUM QUIET libsodium)\n"
+      "endif ()\n"
+      "find_path(Sodium_INCLUDE_DIR NAMES sodium.h HINTS \${PC_SODIUM_INCLUDEDIR})\n"
+      "find_library(Sodium_LIBRARY NAMES sodium libsodium HINTS \${PC_SODIUM_LIBDIR})\n"
+      "if (Sodium_LIBRARY AND Sodium_INCLUDE_DIR AND NOT TARGET Sodium::Sodium)\n"
+      "  add_library(Sodium::Sodium UNKNOWN IMPORTED)\n"
+      "  set_target_properties(Sodium::Sodium PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION \"\${Sodium_LIBRARY}\" INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES \"\${Sodium_INCLUDE_DIR}\")\n"
+      "endif ()\n"
+      "set(Sodium_FOUND \${Sodium_LIBRARY} AND \${Sodium_INCLUDE_DIR})\n")
   endif ()
+  install(
+    FILES "${_tenzir_find_sodium_module}"
+    DESTINATION "${TENZIR_INSTALL_CMAKEDIR}/tenzir"
+    COMPONENT Development)
+  string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
+         "\nfind_package(proxygen REQUIRED CONFIG)")
 endif ()
+message(VERBOSE "Linking Proxygen target: ${_tenzir_proxygen_target}")
+target_compile_definitions(libtenzir PRIVATE TENZIR_HAS_PROXYGEN=1)
+target_compile_definitions(libtenzir_builtins PRIVATE TENZIR_HAS_PROXYGEN=1)
 # gflags is a transitive dependency of glog (used by folly). We must re-export
 # find_package(gflags) so that plugins can resolve the gflags_shared cmake
 # target that appears in the exported transitive link libraries.
@@ -755,6 +767,7 @@ endif ()
 install(
   TARGETS libtenzir libtenzir_builtins ${_tenzir_bundled_simdjson}
           ${_tenzir_bundled_pfs} ${_tenzir_bundled_folly}
+          ${_tenzir_bundled_proxygen}
   EXPORT TenzirTargets
   ARCHIVE DESTINATION "${TENZIR_INSTALL_ARCHIVEDIR}" COMPONENT Development
   LIBRARY DESTINATION "${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}" COMPONENT Runtime
